title: ProjectPal routing.yml
description: Schema for ~/.projectpal/routing.yml — cross-session connector approval state and routing rules.

version.description: Schema version. Must be 1 for v1 files.

connectors.description: Keyed by connector name. Each entry holds the per-connector approval state and model preferences.

routing_rules.description: Ordered list of routing rules. First matching rule wins.

approved.description: Approval state: true = approved, false = declined, null = not yet asked.

approved_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the user approved this connector. Null if not approved.

declined_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the user declined this connector. Null if not declined.

preferred_model.description: Default model for this connector. Null if no model applies (e.g. Cursor v1).

override_model.description: User-specified model override. Null if not set.

phase.description: Phase number this rule applies to.

task_type.description: Task type this rule applies to (e.g. 'refinement').

connector.description: Connector to use when this rule matches.

model.description: Model to use when this rule matches.

fallback.description: Fallback strategy when the connector is unavailable. 'primary' = fall back to the active primary assistant.
